security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss: blob: data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: http: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data: https:; media-src 'self' data: blob: http: https:; frame-src 'self' http: https:;

bundle.shortDescription: World Monitor desktop app (supports World and Tech variants)
bundle.longDescription: World Monitor desktop app for real-time global intelligence. Build with VITE_VARIANT=tech to package Tech Monitor branding and dataset defaults.
